support_service: Custom mixing analysis using computational fluid dynamics (CFD) modeling software
Technical expertise and application experience for system design
Maintenance service for pumps and motors (external components only)
details.shipping_returns: Expected system life of 20+ years in continuous operation. Warranty details available upon request.
key_features_usps: No moving parts within the tank, resulting in minimal maintenance and 20+ year expected system life
Energy efficient operation with up to 50% less energy than conventional diffused aerators
Independent control of mixing and aeration for flexible operation in aerobic and anaerobic conditions
Custom-designed systems using CFD modeling to ensure effective mixing with no dead zones
Suitable for large tanks (10,000+ gallons) and deep tanks (20+ feet) where rotating shaft agitators are ineffective
applications_use_cases: Wastewater treatment: activated sludge, aerobic and anaerobic digesters, equalization tanks, sludge holding tanks
Chemical processing: blending for chemical reactions and synthesis, pH control, gas dispersion
Food and agriculture: corn wet milling and processing, food storage tanks
Mining: mixing phosphoric acid tanks for solids suspension
Oil and petrochemical: recirculating crude oil storage tanks, blending fuel oil tanks
Storm water holding and equalization tanks

technical_specifications.Flow Entrainment: Up to 5 times the pumping capacity
technical_specifications.Configuration Types: Directional Mix Jet Mixers, Bidirectional Mix Jet Mixers, Eddy Mix Jet Mixers, Hydraulic Sludge Mixers
technical_specifications.Materials of Construction: FRP (Fiberglass Reinforced Plastic), 316 Stainless Steel, 440 Stainless Steel, High Chrome Stainless Steel, Duplex Stainless Steel
